## Description

## Scope check

- [ ] This resolves exactly the issue linked above, nothing else.
- [ ] No unrelated files were renamed, moved, or reformatted.
- [ ] No new dependency was introduced without prior discussion in the issue.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] The change was manually tested in the browser.
